svg.style: background: transparent; background-color: transparent; color-scheme: light dark;
svg.content:
<mxfile host="Electron"> <diagram name="engine" id="0"> <mxGraphModel dx="-764" dy="-250" grid="0" gridSize="10" guides="1" tooltips="1" connect="1" arrows="1" fold="0" page="0" pageScale="1" pageWidth="1480" pageHeight="900" math="0" shadow="0"> <root> <mxCell id="0" /> <mxCell id="1" parent="0" /> <mxCell id="2" parent="1" style="text;html=1;strokeColor=none;fillColor=none;align=center;verticalAlign=middle;fontSize=20;fontStyle=1;" value="redisocket.v2 引擎內部架構與訊息流（連線層 ＋ Broker／Presence 抽象層）" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="40" width="1400" x="40" y="20" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="10" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#dae8fc;strokeColor=#6c8ebf;fontSize=12;" value="Client（WebSocket，每連線兩個 goroutine）
readPump 讀入 | writePump 寫出（select on quit 可優雅退出）" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="70" width="400" x="540" y="80" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="21" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#fff2cc;strokeColor=#d6b656;fontSize=12;" value="message workers
（inbound 處理池）
serveChan → re(handler)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="90" width="240" x="120" y="250" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="20" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffe6cc;strokeColor=#d79b00;fontSize=12;fontStyle=1;" value="pool goroutine（單一、引擎核心）

擁有 users map（atomic 在線數鏡像）
broadcast / join / leave / kick
週期 presence.Sync、quit 統一收尾" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="120" width="400" x="540" y="240" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="22" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#fff2cc;strokeColor=#d6b656;fontSize=12;" value="dispatchLoop
（消費 bus 事件）
handleEvent 分派" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="90" width="240" x="1120" y="250" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="23" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#d5e8d4;strokeColor=#82b366;fontSize=12;" value="Sender（對外 publish API）
Push / PushToUid / PushToSid …" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="70" width="240" x="1120" y="430" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="30" parent="1" style="swimlane;startSize=30;html=1;fillColor=#e1d5e7;strokeColor=#9673a6;fontSize=13;fontStyle=1;verticalAlign=top;" value="Broker interface（跨節點 bus：Publish / Subscribe / Close）" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="220" width="600" x="120" y="600" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="31" parent="30" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#f5f5f5;strokeColor=#666666;fontSize=12;" value="redisBroker（現役）
Redis PSUBSCRIBE / PUBLISH
pool.Dial 專用連線、可優雅停止" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="130" width="260" x="30" y="50" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="32" parent="30" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#d5e8d4;strokeColor=#82b366;fontSize=12;" value="natsBroker（新）
subject 路由、header 帶 event
ChanSubscribe ＋ done 優雅停止" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="130" width="260" x="310" y="50" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="40" parent="1" style="swimlane;startSize=30;html=1;fillColor=#e1d5e7;strokeColor=#9673a6;fontSize=13;fontStyle=1;verticalAlign=top;" value="Presence interface（在線/頻道：Touch / Sync / Online / Channels）" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="220" width="600" x="760" y="600" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="41" parent="40" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#f5f5f5;strokeColor=#666666;fontSize=12;" value="redisPresence（現役）
sorted-set ZADD / ZRANGEBYSCORE
全域共享 store" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="130" width="260" x="30" y="50" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="42" parent="40" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#d5e8d4;strokeColor=#82b366;fontSize=12;" value="memoryPresence（已實作）
per-node 記憶體
＋ NATS request/reply 聚合" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="130" width="260" x="310" y="50" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="60" edge="1" parent="1" source="10" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=1;orthogonalLoop=1;jettySize=auto;html=1;endArrow=classic;exitX=0.25;exitY=1;exitDx=0;exitDy=0;entryX=0.5;entryY=0;entryDx=0;entryDy=0;fontSize=11;" target="21" value="① inbound：readPump → serveChan"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="61" edge="1" parent="1" source="21" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=1;orthogonalLoop=1;jettySize=auto;html=1;endArrow=classic;exitX=1;exitY=0.5;exitDx=0;exitDy=0;entryX=0;entryY=0.4;entryDx=0;entryDy=0;fontSize=11;" target="20" value="toSid / kickSid"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="62" edge="1" parent="1" source="20" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=1;orthogonalLoop=1;jettySize=auto;html=1;endArrow=classic;exitX=0.5;exitY=0;exitDx=0;exitDy=0;entryX=0.75;entryY=1;entryDx=0;entryDy=0;fontSize=11;" target="10" value="② outbound：c.send → writePump → ws"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="63" edge="1" parent="1" source="22" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=1;orthogonalLoop=1;jettySize=auto;html=1;endArrow=classic;exitX=0;exitY=0.5;exitDx=0;exitDy=0;entryX=1;entryY=0.5;entryDx=0;entryDy=0;fontSize=11;" target="20" value="msgs（事件串流）"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="64" edge="1" parent="1" source="30" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=1;orthogonalLoop=1;jettySize=auto;html=1;endArrow=classic;exitX=0.5;exitY=0;exitDx=0;exitDy=0;entryX=0.5;entryY=1;entryDx=0;entryDy=0;fontSize=11;" target="22" value="Subscribe"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="65" edge="1" parent="1" source="23" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=1;orthogonalLoop=1;jettySize=auto;html=1;endArrow=classic;exitX=0.25;exitY=1;exitDx=0;exitDy=0;entryX=0.85;entryY=0;entryDx=0;entryDy=0;fontSize=11;" target="30" value="Publish"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="66" edge="1" parent="1" source="20" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=1;orthogonalLoop=1;jettySize=auto;html=1;endArrow=classic;exitX=0.75;exitY=1;exitDx=0;exitDy=0;entryX=0.5;entryY=0;entryDx=0;entryDy=0;fontSize=11;" target="40" value="On→Touch（訂閱）/ Sync（週期）"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="91" parent="1" style="text;html=1;strokeColor=none;fillColor=none;align=center;fontSize=12;fontStyle=2;fontColor=#333333;" value="抽象層是這次重構的核心：連線層／pool／dispatch 只依賴 Broker 與 Presence 介面，
換 Redis→NATS 不動連線邏輯。同一套測試對兩種後端各跑一次、結果一致＝架構成立。" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="50" width="1240" x="120" y="840" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> </root> </mxGraphModel> </diagram> </mxfile>

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 1px; height: 1px; padding-top: 20px; margin-left: 700px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: center; color: #000000;
display: inline-block; font-size: 20px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#000000, #ffffff); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; font-weight: bold; white-space: nowrap;

div.div: redisocket.v2 引擎內部架構與訊息流（連線層 ＋ Broker／Presence 抽象層）

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe flex-start; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 1px; height: 1px; padding-top: 827px; margin-left: 700px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: center; color: #333333;
display: inline-block; font-size: 12px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#333333, #c1c1c1); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; font-style: italic; white-space: nowrap;

div.div:
抽象層是這次重構的核心：連線層／pool／dispatch 只依賴 Broker 與 Presence 介面，
換 Redis→NATS 不動連線邏輯。同一套測試對兩種後端各跑一次、結果一致＝架構成立。

a.text: Text is not SVG - cannot display
